title: OHP ASSISTER - 211info
text: LIONS WELLNESS CENTER ST HELENS HIGH SCHOOL SBHC OHP ASSISTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers in-person assistance applying and renewing for the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). 2370 Gable Road Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Columbia County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4:30pm Services: Navigator Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
